phoneticUs: ﾋ伊｡ﾉ騨尽ﾉ冪ﾉ藩人; ﾋ伊｡ﾉ騨尽ﾉ厖継oﾊ獲
examples: Remove the gossypol, however, and you'd have a cheap and abundant form of protein for everyone.
Gossypol, especially the (-) -gossypol, has the function of male antifertility, anti-cancer and anti-virus.
But get rid of all the gossypol, as plant breeders did in the 1950s, and insects will devour the defenseless cotton.
